reason_not_scored: This video is an instructional/training session about assessment administration procedures, not a performance of an FLS surgical task. The content shows training on how to conduct assessments (attendance checks, candidate qualification explanation, re-assessment procedures, feedback provision, confidentiality requirements, occupational safety, and assessment administration), with narration and procedural explanations throughout. No laparoscopic surgical task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) is being performed.
content_observed: Opening remarks acknowledging AC Manager, Processing Officer, and TeSDa Representative
Candidate attendance checking and admission slip collection procedures
Explanation of qualifications and competencies to be assessed
Occupational Safety and Health Requirements discussion
Distribution of Specific Instruction documents to candidates
Candidate demonstration scenarios (written test and simulated task performance)
rationale: This is clearly instructional content about assessment administration and proctor training, not a performance of any FLS surgical task. No scoring is applicable.
